attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 A.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
 ,A.PRODUCT_KEY                   
 ,A.AR_TRX_KEY                    
 ,A.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
 ,A.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
 ,A.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
 ,A.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              
 ,A.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY           
 ,A.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
 ,A.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY        
 ,A.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG          
 ,A.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG         
 ,A.AS_OF_FSC_MTH_PTR_STE_PRTY_KEY
 ,A.AS_OF_FSC_MTH_CHANNEL_BKGS_FLG
 ,A.AS_OF_FSC_MTH_CHNL_DRP_SHP_FLG
 ,A.DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG
 ,A.SALES_REP_NUM                 
 ,A.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         
 ,A.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD            
 ,A.SALES_CHANNEL_CD              
 ,A.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD          
 ,A.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CD             
 ,A.ADJUSTMENT_CD                 
 ,A.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD    
 ,A.ACQUISITION_FLG               
 ,A.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG        
 ,A.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG        
 ,A.OVERLAY_FLG                   
 ,A.IC_REVENUE_FLG                
 ,A.CHARGES_FLG                   
 ,A.SALESREP_FLG                  
 ,A.MISC_FLG                      
 ,A.SERVICE_FLG                   
 ,A.INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG        
 ,A.REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG          
 ,A.REVENUE_FLG                   
 ,A.RMA_FLG                       
 ,A.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT        
 ,A.CONVERSION_RT       
  ,NSO.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME AS DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM          
 ,A.CONVERSION_DT                 
 ,A.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM           
 ,A.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     
 ,A.DD_BK_SO_NUM_INT              
 ,A.DD_SLS_ORD_OPERATING_UNIT_CD  
 ,A.ADJUSTMENT_DESCR_KEY          
 ,A.DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD            
 ,A.DV_TRANSACTION_TYPE           
 ,A.TRADE_IN_AMT                  
 ,A.COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT         
 ,A.COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT        
 ,A.COMP_US_COST_AMT              
 ,A.EXTENDED_QTY                  
 ,A.COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT    
 ,A.COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT   
 ,A.COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMT         
 ,A.EXTENDED_HOLD_QTY             
 ,A.COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT   
 ,COALESCE( NSO.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME,NSO.ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME) DV_BOOKED_DTM                
 ,CAST(COALESCE( NSO.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME,NSO.ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME) AS DATE) DV_BOOKED_DT
 ,NSO.ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME AS ORACLE_BOOKED_DTM            
 ,CAST(NSO.ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME AS DATE) AS ORACLE_BOOKED_DT   
 ,A.CANCEL_CD
 ,A.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG /* ADDED PART OF TRUE DEMAND */
 ,A.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG  /* ADDED PART OF TRUE DEMAND */
 /*,A.EDW_CREATE_DTM                
 ,A.EDW_CREATE_USER               
 ,A.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
 ,A.EDW_UPDATE_USER */ 
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER  
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM                                     
,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER /* CHG0463914 Adding WHO col updates*/ 
 ,'I'ACTION_CODE                   
 ,'I' DML_TYPE     
 /*Q3FY14 OA*/
 ,A.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
 ,A.DV_PRODUCT_KEY
 ,A.DV_FMV_FLG             
 ,A.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY/*FMV Q2FY15*/
 ,A.CALENDAR_YEAR_MONTH_INT
 ,A.DSV_FLG, /*ADDED ATTRIBUTE LOGIC AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16 BY */
 A.DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_CD         , /* PNEELRAJ ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/
A.DV_AS_OF_FSC_MTH_RTM_CD     ,    /*PNEELRAJ ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/ 
A.DV_DEAL_ID  /*as part SOT June CDR*/
, A.XCAT_FLG, /*ADDED BY VKOPPURA AS PART OF RO PROJECT RELEASE: Q3FY17 */
 A.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME, /*ADDED BY VKOPPURA AS PART OF RO PROJECT RELEASE: Q3FY17 */
 A.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG /*ADDED BY VKOPPURA AS PART OF RO PROJECT RELEASE: Q3FY17 */
 , A.ELA_FLG /*ADDED BY VKOPPURA AS PART OF RO PROJECT RELEASE: Q3FY17 */
 ,A.DV_PURCHASE_ADJ_DSCNT_USD_AMT /* Q1FY18 PA */ 
 ,A.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD          /* Q1FY18 RO */
 ,A.DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT /*added as part product BGM - Q1FY18 release */
 ,A.DV_BGM_NON_STANDARD_COST_AMT /*added as part product BGM - Q1FY18 release */
 ,A.POB_TYPE_CD
 ,A.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
 ,A.SALES_MOTION_CD
 ,A.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG
 ,A.DV_DBT_TYP   /* Added as part of Feb2018Rel*/
 /*Below two columns added as part of Acquisition Q4FY19 - May Release*/
,A.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD
,A.ACQUISITION_ROLE
,a.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_CODE AS SALES_ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_CODE 
,A.BOOKING_CHANNEL_TYPE 
,A.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
,A.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_BKG_AMOUNT /*ADDED AS PART OF SFP Q4FY21 REL*/
,A.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY22 EA Vnext */
 ,A.ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
 ,A.MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT
   ,A.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,A.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,A.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
 FROM       
 $$STGDB.WI1_RSTD_BKGS_ORDER_MTH  A
 INNER JOIN 
 $$ETLVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV  NSO 
 ON 
 A.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
 AND NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY  IN (-9999,-8888,-7777) /*added as part of Q1FY15 REL*/
 
 UNION ALL
 
 SELECT
 A.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
 ,A.PRODUCT_KEY                   
 ,A.AR_TRX_KEY                    
 ,A.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
 ,A.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
 ,A.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
 ,A.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              
 ,A.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY

 ,A.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY        
 ,A.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG          
 ,A.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG         
 ,A.AS_OF_FSC_MTH_PTR_STE_PRTY_KEY
 ,A.AS_OF_FSC_MTH_CHANNEL_BKGS_FLG
 ,A.AS_OF_FSC_MTH_CHNL_DRP_SHP_FLG
 ,A.DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG
 ,A.SALES_REP_NUM                 
 ,A.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         
 ,A.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD            
 ,A.SALES_CHANNEL_CD              
 ,A.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD          
 ,A.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CD             
 ,A.ADJUSTMENT_CD                 
 ,A.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD    
 ,A.ACQUISITION_FLG               
 ,A.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG        
 ,A.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG        
 ,A.OVERLAY_FLG                   
 ,A.IC_REVENUE_FLG                
 ,A.CHARGES_FLG                   
 ,A.SALESREP_FLG                  
 ,A.MISC_FLG                      
 ,A.SERVICE_FLG                   
 ,A.INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG        
 ,A.REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG          
 ,A.REVENUE_FLG                   
 ,A.RMA_FLG                       
 ,A.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT        
 ,A.CONVERSION_RT       
  ,NSO.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME AS DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM          
 ,A.CONVERSION_DT                 
 ,A.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM           
 ,A.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     
 ,A.DD_BK_SO_NUM_INT              
 ,A.DD_SLS_ORD_OPERATING_UNIT_CD  
 ,A.ADJUSTMENT_DESCR_KEY          
 ,A.DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD            
 ,A.DV_TRANSACTION_TYPE           
 ,A.TRADE_IN_AMT                  
 ,A.COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT         
 ,A.COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT        
 ,A.COMP_US_COST_AMT              
 ,A.EXTENDED_QTY                  
 ,A.COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT    
 ,A.COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT   
 ,A.COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMT         
 ,A.EXTENDED_HOLD_QTY             
 ,A.COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT   
 ,COALESCE( NSO.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME,NSO.ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME) DV_BOOKED_DTM                
 ,CAST(COALESCE( NSO.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME,NSO.ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME) AS DATE) DV_BOOKED_DT                 
 ,NSO.ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME AS ORACLE_BOOKED_DTM            
 ,CAST(NSO.ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME AS DATE) AS ORACLE_BOOKED_DT   
 ,A.CANCEL_CD
 ,A.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG /* ADDED PART OF TRUE DEMAND */
 ,A.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG  /* ADDED PART OF TRUE DEMAND */
 /*,A.EDW_CREATE_DTM                
 ,A.EDW_CREATE_USER               
 ,A.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
 ,A.EDW_UPDATE_USER */
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER  
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM                                     
,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER /* CHG0463914 Adding WHO col updates*/  
 ,'I'ACTION_CODE                   
 ,'I' DML_TYPE    
 /*Q3FY14 OA*/
 ,A.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
 ,A.DV_PRODUCT_KEY
 ,A.DV_FMV_FLG            
 ,A.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY/*FMV Q2FY15*/
 ,A.CALENDAR_YEAR_MONTH_INT
 ,A.DSV_FLG, /*ADDED ATTRIBUTE LOGIC AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16 BY */
A.DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_CD         , /* PNEELRAJ ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/
A.DV_AS_OF_FSC_MTH_RTM_CD     ,    /*PNEELRAJ ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/  
A.DV_DEAL_ID  /*as part SOT June CDR*/
, A.XCAT_FLG, /*ADDED BY VKOPPURA AS PART OF RO PROJECT RELEASE: Q3FY17 */
 A.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME, /*ADDED BY VKOPPURA AS PART OF RO PROJECT RELEASE: Q3FY17 */
 A.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG /*ADDED BY VKOPPURA AS PART OF RO PROJECT RELEASE: Q3FY17 */
, A.ELA_FLG /*ADDED BY VKOPPURA AS PART OF RO PROJECT RELEASE: Q3FY17 */
 ,A.DV_PURCHASE_ADJ_DSCNT_USD_AMT /* Q1FY18 PA */ 
  ,A.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD          /* Q1FY18 RO */
   ,A.DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT /*added as part product BGM - Q1FY18 release */
 ,A.DV_BGM_NON_STANDARD_COST_AMT /*added as part product BGM - Q1FY18 release */
,A.POB_TYPE_CD
,A.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
,A.SALES_MOTION_CD
,A.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG
,A.DV_DBT_TYP   /* Added as part of Feb2018Rel*/
/*Below two columns added as part of Acquisition Q4FY19 - May Release*/
,A.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD
,A.ACQUISITION_ROLE
,a.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_CODE  AS SALES_ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_CODE 
,A.BOOKING_CHANNEL_TYPE
,A.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
,A.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_BKG_AMOUNT /*ADDED AS PART OF SFP Q4FY21 REL*/
,A.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY22 EA Vnext */
 ,A.ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
 ,A.MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT
   ,A.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,A.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,A.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
A.MNTLY_SUBSCR_CHRG_UPLIFT_US_AMT,
 FROM       
 $$STGDB.WI1_RSTD_BKGS_ORDER_MTH  A
 INNER JOIN 
 $$ETLVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV  NSO 
 ON 
 A.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
 AND NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY  NOT IN (-9999,-8888,-7777) /*added as part of Q1FY15 REL*/

SELECT
 A.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
 ,A.PRODUCT_KEY                   
 ,A.AR_TRX_KEY                    
 ,A.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY

 ,A.AS_OF_FSC_MTH_PTR_STE_PRTY_KEY
 ,A.AS_OF_FSC_MTH_CHANNEL_BKGS_FLG
 ,A.AS_OF_FSC_MTH_CHNL_DRP_SHP_FLG
 ,A.DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG

 ,A.INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG        
 ,A.REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG          
 ,A.REVENUE_FLG                   
 ,A.RMA_FLG                       
 ,A.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT        
 ,A.CONVERSION_RT       
  ,NSO.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME AS DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM          
 ,A.CONVERSION_DT                 
 ,A.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM           
 ,A.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     
 ,A.DD_BK_SO_NUM_INT              
 ,A.DD_SLS_ORD_OPERATING_UNIT_CD  
 ,A.ADJUSTMENT_DESCR_KEY          
 ,A.DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD            
 ,A.DV_TRANSACTION_TYPE           
 ,A.TRADE_IN_AMT                  
 ,A.COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT         
 ,A.COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT        
 ,A.COMP_US_COST_AMT              
 ,A.EXTENDED_QTY                  
 ,A.COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT    
 ,A.COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT   
 ,A.COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMT         
 ,A.EXTENDED_HOLD_QTY             
 ,A.COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT   
 ,COALESCE( NSO.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME,NSO.ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME) DV_BOOKED_DTM                
 ,CAST(COALESCE( NSO.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME,NSO.ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME) AS DATE) DV_BOOKED_DT                 
 ,NSO.ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME AS ORACLE_BOOKED_DTM            
 ,CAST(NSO.ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME AS DATE) AS ORACLE_BOOKED_DT   
 ,A.CANCEL_CD
 ,A.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG /* ADDED PART OF TRUE DEMAND */
 ,A.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG  /* ADDED PART OF TRUE DEMAND */
/*,A.EDW_CREATE_DTM                
 ,A.EDW_CREATE_USER               
 ,A.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
 ,A.EDW_UPDATE_USER */
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER  
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM                                     
,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER /* CHG0463914 Adding WHO col updates*/  
 ,'I'ACTION_CODE                   
 ,'I' DML_TYPE     
 /*Q3FY14 OA*/
 ,A.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
 ,A.DV_PRODUCT_KEY 
 ,A.DV_FMV_FLG           
 ,A.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY/*FMV Q2FY15*/
 ,A.CALENDAR_YEAR_MONTH_INT
 ,A.DSV_FLG, /*ADDED ATTRIBUTE LOGIC AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16 BY */
  A.DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_CD         , /* PNEELRAJ ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/
A.DV_AS_OF_FSC_MTH_RTM_CD   ,      /*PNEELRAJ ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/ 
A.DV_DEAL_ID  /*as part SOT June CDR*/
, A.XCAT_FLG, /*ADDED BY VKOPPURA AS PART OF RO PROJECT RELEASE: Q3FY17 */
 A.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME, /*ADDED BY VKOPPURA AS PART OF RO PROJECT RELEASE: Q3FY17 */
 A.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG /*ADDED BY VKOPPURA AS PART OF RO PROJECT RELEASE: Q3FY17 */
,A.ELA_FLG /*ADDED BY VKOPPURA AS PART OF RO PROJECT RELEASE: Q3FY17 */
 ,A.DV_PURCHASE_ADJ_DSCNT_USD_AMT /* Q1FY18 PA */ 
 ,A.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD          /* Q1FY18 RO */
 ,A.DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT /*added as part product BGM - Q1FY18 release */
,A.DV_BGM_NON_STANDARD_COST_AMT /*added as part product BGM - Q1FY18 release */
,A.POB_TYPE_CD
,A.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
,A.SALES_MOTION_CD
,A.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG
,A.DV_DBT_TYP   /* Added as part of FEB2018Rel*/
/*Below two columns added as part of Acquisition Q4FY19 - May Release*/
,A.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD
,A.ACQUISITION_ROLE
,a.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_CODE AS SALES_ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_CODE 
,A.BOOKING_CHANNEL_TYPE 
,A.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
,A.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_BKG_AMOUNT /*ADDED AS PART OF SFP Q4FY21 REL*/
,A.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY22 EA Vnext */
 ,A.ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
 ,A.MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT
,A.DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_DESCRIPTION
  ,A.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,A.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,A.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
 FROM       
 $$STGDB.WI2_RSTD_BKGS_ORDER_MTH  A
 INNER JOIN
 $$ETLVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV  NSO 
 ON
 A.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
 AND NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY  IN (-9999,-8888,-7777) /*added as part of Q1FY15 REL*/
 WHERE 1 = 2 /*as part of performance recommendations copied code to presql*/
 
 UNION ALL

 A.SALES_ORDER_KEY

 ,CAST(COALESCE( NSO.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME,NSO.ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME) AS DATE) DV_BOOKED_DT                 
 ,NSO.ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME AS ORACLE_BOOKED_DTM

 ,A.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG  /* ADDED PART OF TRUE DEMAND */

 /*Q3FY14 OA*/
 ,A.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
 ,A.DV_PRODUCT_KEY 
 ,A.DV_FMV_FLG     
 ,A.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY/*FMV Q2FY15*/
 ,A.CALENDAR_YEAR_MONTH_INT

A.DV_DEAL_ID  /*as part SOT June CDR*/
, A.XCAT_FLG, /*ADDED BY VKOPPURA AS PART OF RO PROJECT RELEASE: Q3FY17 */
 A.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME, /*ADDED BY VKOPPURA AS PART OF RO PROJECT RELEASE: Q3FY17 */
 A.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG /*ADDED BY VKOPPURA AS PART OF RO PROJECT RELEASE: Q3FY17 */
 ,A.ELA_FLG /*ADDED BY VKOPPURA AS PART OF RO PROJECT RELEASE: Q3FY17 */
 ,A.DV_PURCHASE_ADJ_DSCNT_USD_AMT /* Q1FY18 PA */ 
  ,A.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD          /* Q1FY18 RO */
  ,A.DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT /*added as part product BGM - Q1FY18 release */
  ,A.DV_BGM_NON_STANDARD_COST_AMT /*added as part product BGM - Q1FY18 release */
 ,A.POB_TYPE_CD
 ,A.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
 ,A.SALES_MOTION_CD
,A.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG
,A.DV_DBT_TYP   /*Added as part of FEB2018REL*/
/*Below two columns added as part of Acquisition Q4FY19 - May Release*/
,A.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD
,A.ACQUISITION_ROLE
,a.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_CODE AS SALES_ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_CODE 
,A.BOOKING_CHANNEL_TYPE
,A.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
,A.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_BKG_AMOUNT /*ADDED AS PART OF SFP Q4FY21 REL*/
,A.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY22 EA Vnext */
 ,A.ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
 ,A.MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT
 ,A.DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_DESCRIPTION
   ,A.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,A.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,A.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
,A.MNTLY_SUBSCR_CHRG_UPLIFT_US_AMT
 FROM       
 $$STGDB.WI2_RSTD_BKGS_ORDER_MTH  A
 INNER JOIN
 $$ETLVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV  NSO 
 ON
 A.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
 AND NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY  NOT IN (-9999,-8888,-7777) /*added as part of Q1FY15 REL*/
 WHERE 1 = 2 /*as part of performance recommendations copied code to presql*/
